ListInstances.marker: Starting position for paginated list query, a system-generated string
ListInstances.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, typically no more than 1000, default is 1000
ListInstances.showRdmaTopo: Whether to retrieve RDMA high-performance network topology information
ListInstances.instanceIds: Multiple instance IDs, comma-separated, up to 100
ListInstances.instanceNames: Multiple instance names, comma-separated, exact match, up to 100
ListInstances.fuzzyInstanceName: Instance name supporting fuzzy keyword search; mutually exclusive with instanceNames
ListInstances.volumeIds: Multiple volume IDs, comma-separated, up to 100
ListInstances.deploySetIds: Multiple deploy set IDs, comma-separated, up to 100
ListInstances.securityGroupIds: Multiple security group IDs, comma-separated, up to 100
ListInstances.status: Instance status (Recycled / Running / Stopped / Stopping / Starting)
ListInstances.tags: Multiple tags, comma-separated, format: tagKey:tagValue or tagKey
ListInstances.vpcId: VPC ID, can only be used in combination with privateIps
ListInstances.privateIps: Multiple private IPs, comma-separated, up to 100, must be used with vpcId
